---
output: hugodown::md_document
title: "coral"
date: 2021-02-10
summary: ''
---

```{r include=FALSE}
root <- rprojroot::find_root("_hugodown.yaml")
source(file.path(root, "themes", "diziet", "R", "diziet.R"))
```


> The exploration process

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
diziet$make_gallery(
  preview = "preview_01", 
  preview_fmt = "jpg",
  full = "image_01", 
  full_fmt = "png"
)
```
